steps.title: Recognize like terms
steps.content: All three terms contain the same factor $x^6$. Since they have identical variable and exponent, they are like terms that can be combined.

steps.title: Combine the coefficients
steps.content:
Add and subtract the coefficients of the like terms:
$$7 + 9 - 8 = 16 - 8 = 8$$
Therefore, $7x^6 + 9x^6 - 8x^6 = 8x^6$, which means $b = 8$.
